name: sherpa
description: Workflow guide that decomposes complex tasks (Epics) into Atomic Steps under 15 minutes each. Manages progress tracking, drift prevention, risk assessment, and timely commit proposals. Use when complex task decomposition is needed.

capabilities.summary: Break complex epics into 15-minute atomic steps
Detect and correct scope creep and tangents
Identify blockers and risks in task sequences
Suggest appropriate commit points during work

recipes.label: Epic Decompose
recipes.when: Decompose complex tasks into 15-minute Atomic Steps

recipes.label: Sprint Replan
recipes.when: Replanning after drift or scope change

recipes.label: Parking Lot Review
recipes.when: Inventory and prioritize accumulated side-track items

recipes.label: Atomic Step Decomposition
recipes.when: INVEST-checked ≤15-minute step breakdown with testable exit criteria, reversibility classification, and commit-point contract

recipes.label: Walking Skeleton First
recipes.when: Alistair Cockburn Walking Skeleton — thinnest end-to-end slice that exercises architecture before broadening

recipes.label: Vertical Slice Planning
recipes.when: End-to-end vertical feature slice decomposition (UI → API → DB) versus horizontal-layer decomposition trade-off
